div.h1: Memory Usage: FP32 vs SQ8 vs PQ

g.text: ■ FP32: Full precision, no accuracy loss

div.p: 64× compression enables searching 100M vectors on a single 64GB server that could only hold ~20M vectors at FP32 precision. Trade-off: PQ's 15% recall loss is often acceptable for applications where speed and scale matter more than perfect ranking.
